sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kah leh lungkham teng veng ta
Na hoih tampi ka ngah ta

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei hong cing Pa lusu ngeilo hi
Sihna kuampi lam ka tuak zong

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sun in niin hong gimsak lo ding hi
Zan in Kha in zong hong sukhalo ding hi
A khut kuak sung'n tu'n koih hi
